title: Rohit Jain appointed as RBI deputy Governor
content:
The government has appointed Rohit Jain as a deputy Governor of the Reserve Bank of India, according to a government notice.
Mr. Jain’s appointment will take effect from May 3 for a period of three years, the notice said.
Published - May 02, 2026 02:59 pm IST

title: 9-year-old mountaineer from Siddipet scales Australia’s highest peak
content:
Vihaan Ram, a nine-year-old mountaineer from Hanuma Thanda in Dhoolimitta mandal of Siddipet district, has successfully scaled Mount Kosciuszko, the highest peak on the Australian continent, on Saturday.
Vihaan undertook the expedition with a social message, carrying a banner urging youth to ‘Say No to Drugs’. Through his climbs, he seeks to promote a drug-free lifestyle and encourage young people to focus on health, sports and positive goals.
Published - May 03, 2026 07:07 am IST
